blocks.content: Preparations always take longer than planned. The goal is not to have a beautifully furnished van right away, but to ensure the basics function.

images.alt: The solar charge controller and the inverter
A stabel internet connection for online work

blocks.content: There is a bed to sleep on, the electricity works and there is an internet connextion, so we can leave for a test drive. But then comes an unexpected turn of events: the van is not yet fully mechanically sound, so we cannot leave yet! When traveling in a van, you always have to be able to handle unexpected twists. Adjusting plans, and above all realizing that this is not so bad at all, and that traveling is largely about this ability to adapt. The advantage now is that I can start doing that even before a test drive has begun!

The van was checked mechanically and we are ready to hit the road! There might be a few extra things that need to be done later, but for now, we are on our way. So, really picking up the van next week! And I promise I will post more photos then too.
Test whether this third blogpost also appears.
